headline: American International Group (AIG) Could Be a Great Choice
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does American International Group (AIG) have what it takes? Let's find out.

raw.headline: American International Group (AIG) Could Be a Great Choice
raw.summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does American International Group (AIG) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on American International Gr, Raises Price Target to $88
summary: Citigroup  analyst Matthew Heimermann   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $85 to $88.
